title: Colonization
description: Modpack for version 1.20.1, based on Minecolonies mod.
body:
Experience the "Colonization Modpack" in Minecraft, an immersive journey of exploration, settlement, and empire-building. Establish and expand thriving colonies in a vast world. Build impressive structures, gather resources, and create a bustling economy. Customize colonies with unique styles, fortifications, and infrastructure. Discover new lands, diverse biomes, and fascinating creatures. Delve into advanced technologies, research advancements, and ensure colony growth. Manage citizen needs and protect them from threats.
Are you ready to embark on this epic journey of colonization and leave your mark on Minecraft's history?

![Colonization Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vN52R28Q/images/3b1ce84001b7e8f9fef057fbae4356548e6b5a6a.png)

<details>

<summary>Complete mod list:</summary>

+ **3D Skin Layers** | By [tr7zw](https://github.com/tr7zw). Renders the player skin layer in 3d. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/skin-layers-3d) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers)
+ **Additional Structures** | By [XxRexRaptorxX (RexRaptor)](https://github.com/XxRexRaptorxX). Adds over 150 new structures to the game to enhance your world! [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/additional-structures) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/additional-structures)
+ **Advancement Plaques** | By [Grend](https://anthonyhilyard.com/). Replaces standard advancement toasts with fancy plaques. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/advancement-plaques) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancement-plaques)
+ **AI Improvements** | By [BuiltBrokenModding](https://github.com/BuiltBrokenModding). Small adjustments and improvements to AI logic focusing on optimizations for increased server performance [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ai-improvements) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ai-improvements)
+ **Alex's Mobs** | By [Alexthe668](https://github.com/AlexModGuy), [Carro1001](https://github.com/Carro1001), [Paint_Ninja](https://github.com/PaintNinja). New, original, engaging, and aesthetic mobs for Minecraft. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-mobs)
+ **Ambient Environment** | By [Jaredlll08](https://github.com/jaredlll08). Adds more ambiance to the game [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ambient-environment) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambient-environment)
+ **AmbientSounds** | By [CreativeMD](https://github.com/CreativeMD). Expands minecraft's ambient sounds. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ambientsounds) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds)
+ **AppleSkin** | By [squeek](https://github.com/squeek502). Adds various food-related HUD improvements [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/appleskin) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
+ **Architectury** | By [shedaniel](https://github.com/shedaniel). A intermediary api aimed to ease developing multiplatform mods. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/architectury-api) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)
+ **Balm** | By [BlayTheNinth](https://mods.twelveiterations.com/). Abstraction Layer (but not really)™ for Blay's multiplatform mods [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/balm) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/balm)
+ **BedBenefits** | By [Darkhax](https://github.com/Darkhax). Powers up beds with additional benefits! [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bed-benefits) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/bed-benefits)
+ **Better Advancements** | By [way2muchnoise](https://github.com/way2muchnoise). Improvements to the advancements screen. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-advancements) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements)
+ **Better Combat** | By [Daedelus](https://github.com/ZsoltMolnarrr). Easy, spectacular and fun melee combat system from Minecraft Dungeons. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-combat-by-daedelus) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)
+ **Better Minecarts** | By [Xannosz](https://github.com/Xannosz). Simple minecart mod, with cute locomotives and without a fancy new rail system. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xannoszs-better-minecarts)
+ **BetterBurning** | By [Darkhax](https://github.com/Darkhax). Improves burning mechanics in Minecraft. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-burning) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-burning)
+ **Block Runner** | By [Fuzs](https://github.com/Fuzss). Encourages path building by making you run faster on certain blocks such as path blocks. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/block-runner-forge) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/block-runner)
+ **Bookshelf** | By [Darkhax](https://github.com/Darkhax). A library for building other mods. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bookshelf) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/bookshelf-lib)
+ **Brighter (block light)** | By [USS_Shenzhou](https://github.com/USS-Shenzhou). Double your block light. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/brighter-block-light)
+ **Chat Heads** | By [dzwdz](https://github.com/dzwdz), [Fourmisain](https://github.com/Fourmisain). See who are you chatting with! [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chat-heads) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads)
+ **Chipped** | By [Alex Nijjar](https://github.com/AlexNijjar), [Grimbop](https://curseforge.com/members/grimbop), [Kekie6](https://curseforge.com/members/kekie6), [ThatGravyBoat](https://github.com/ThatGravyBoat). Every block needs a friend! [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chipped) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped)
+ **Chunky** | By [pop4959](https://github.com/pop4959). Pre-generates chunks, quickly, efficiently, and safely [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chunky-pregenerator-forge) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky)
+ **Citadel** | By [Alexthe666](https://github.com/AlexModGuy). A shared code library for many of Alexthe666's mods. Code used from LLibrary with permission. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/citadel)
+ **Client Tweaks** | By [BlayTheNinth](https://mods.twelveiterations.com/). There, I fixed Minecraft for you. Various optional tweaks to improve Minecraft Quality of Life. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/client-tweaks) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/client-tweaks)
+ **Climb Ladders Fast** | By [spoorn](https://curseforge.com/members/spoorn). Climb ladders, vines, and scaffolding faster [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/climb-ladders-fast)
+ **Cloth Config** | By [shedaniel](https://github.com/shedaniel). An API for config screens. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
+ **Clumps** | By [Jaredlll08](https://github.com/jaredlll08). Clumps xp orbs together. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/clumps) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps)
+ **Combat Roll** | By [Daedelus](https://github.com/ZsoltMolnarrr). Adds combat roll ability, with related attributes and enchantments. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/combat-roll) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/combat-roll)
+ **Comforts** | By [Illusive Soulworks](https://github.com/illusivesoulworks). Adds sleeping bags and hammocks for, respectively, portability and turning day to night, without setting new spawns. + **Companion** | By [Snownee](https://github.com/Snownee). Protect your pets. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/companion) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/companion)
+ **Continents** | By [Stardust Labs](https://www.stardustlabs.net/). Continents is a small add-on mod to reshape the world so that landmasses are further apart, varying in size and shape. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/continents) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/continents)
+ **Controlling** | By [Jaredlll08](https://github.com/jaredlll08). Adds the ability to search for keybinds using their name in the KeyBinding menu, this allows players to easily find a key binding in the menu. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/controlling) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling)
+ **Corail Woodcutter** | By [Corail31](https://github.com/Corail31), Gegy1000. The wooden version of the StoneCutter [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corail-woodcutter)
+ **Corn Delight** | By [MCMOD Modding Group](https://github.com/0999312). Do you like Corn? Now Corn in Farmer's Delight! [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corn-delight) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/corn-delight)
+ **Corpse** | By [Max Henkel](https://github.com/henkelmax). This mod brings a corpse into the game. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corpse) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/corpse)
+ **CraftingTweaks** | By [BlayTheNinth](https://mods.twelveiterations.com/). Allows you to rotate, balance or clear the crafting matrix by the press of a button, in any (supported) crafting window. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crafting-tweaks) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafting-tweaks)
+ **CreativeCore** | By [CreativeMD](https://github.com/CreativeMD). A simple but powerful coremod. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/creativecore) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativecore)
+ **Curios API** | By [C4](https://github.com/TheIllusiveC4). A flexible and expandable accessory/equipment API for users and developers. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/curios) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)
+ **Cyclic** | By [Lothrazar](https://github.com/Lothrazar). This mod adds a large variety of unrelated items, tools, machines, enchantments, and a few potions. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cyclic)
+ **Default Options** | By [BlayTheNinth](https://mods.twelveiterations.com/). A way for modpacks to ship a default (key) configuration without having to include an options.txt file. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/default-options) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/default-options)
+ **Ding** | By [iChun](https://ichun.me/). Plays a sound once the client has loaded to the main menu, a server, or resources [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ding) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ding)
+ **Domum Ornamentum** | By [LDTTeam](https://github.com/ldtteam), [OrionDevelopment](https://curseforge.com/members/OrionOnline). Home decorations made easy. Out of several materials [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/domum-ornamentum)
+ **Drippy Loading Screen** | By [Keksuccino](https://github.com/Keksuccino). Drippy Loading Screen is a client-side Forge mod to fully customize Minecraft's loading screen (aka. splash screen). [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/drippy-loading-screen) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/drippy-loading-screen)
+ **Dynamic Lights** | By [AtomicStryker](https://github.com/AtomicStryker). Shine light from held and dropped items [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-lights)

+ **FancyMenu** | By [Keksuccino](https://github.com/Keksuccino). FancyMenu is a client-side Minecraft Java Edition mod to customize menu screens and it's the first mod ever with an in-game menu editor UI to customize menu screens without leaving the game and without hours of writing JSON files, because nobody likes that. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fancymenu-forge) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fancymenu)
+ **Farmer's Delight** | By [vectorwing](https://github.com/vectorwing). A cozy farming and cooking expansion for Minecraft! [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
+ **Fast Leaf Decay** | By [Olafski](https://curseforge.com/members/olafskiii). Increases leaves decay rate, so that you won't end up with a bunch of floating leaves. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fast-leaf-decay)
+ **Forgery** | By [unascribed](https://github.com/unascribed). A huge collection of vanilla tweaks and small features.[![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forgery) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabrication)
+ **Geode+** | By [yeoxuhang](https://github.com/YeoXuHang), SquizzleDizzle. A Forge/Fabric mod that add geodes to Minecraft Overworld, Nether and even The End! [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geode-plus)
+ **Geophilic** | By [bebebea_loste](https://curseforge.com/members/bebebea_loste). A subtle overhaul of Overworld biomes [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geophilic) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/geophilic)
+ **GJEB (GammaJustExtremeBright)** | By [HyCraftHD](https://github.com/HyCraftHD). This mod just let you customize your gamma ingame from 0% to 1000%. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gjeb)
+ **HerdMentality** | By [Darkhax](https://github.com/Darkhax). A framework for creating custom progression systems. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/herd-mentality) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/herd-mentality)
+ **Iceberg** | By [Grend](https://anthonyhilyard.com/). A library containing events, helpers, and utilities to make modding easier. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iceberg) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/iceberg)
+ **InControl** | By [McJty](https://github.com/McJty). Be in control of spawns [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/in-control) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/in-control)
+ **ItemPhysicLite** | By [CreativeMD](https://github.com/CreativeMD). Enhances the rendering of items. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/itemphysic-lite) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/itemphysic-lite)
+ **Jade** | By [Snownee](https://github.com/Snownee). Minecraft mod shows what you are looking at. (Hwyla fork) [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jade) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)
+ **Just Enough Items** | By [mezz](https://github.com/mezz). JEI is an item and recipe viewing mod for Minecraft, built from the ground up for stability and performance. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
+ **Just Enough Professions (JEP)** | By [Mrbysco](https://github.com/Mrbysco), [ShyNieke](https://github.com/ShyNieke). Adds info about professions to JEI [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/just-enough-professions-jep) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-professions-jep)
+ **Just Enough Resources** | By [way2muchnoise](https://github.com/way2muchnoise). Adds Resources and Mob Drops to JEI [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/just-enough-resources-jer) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-resources-jer)
+ **Konkrete** | By [Keksuccino](https://github.com/Keksuccino). Konkrete is a library mod used as base for my other mods. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/konkrete) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/konkrete)
+ **Krypton Reforged** | By [Anthxny](https://github.com/anthxnymc). Networking optimization mod. Required on client as well. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/krypton-reforged)
+ **Legendary Tooltips** | By [Grend](https://anthonyhilyard.com/). Gives rare items a fancy tooltip and adds additional tooltip configuration options. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/legendary-tooltips) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips)
+ **Load My Resources** | By [Keksuccino](https://github.com/Keksuccino). Load My Resources" is a client-side mod to automatically load resources like images and sounds on game start. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/load-my-resources-forge) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/P6Amoeo.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/load-my-resources)
+ **Lootr** | By [Noobanidus](https://github.com/noobanidus). Makes loot chest loot per-user. [![Curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/T5dC32l.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lootr)
